title: SixSeven
description: Who decided stacks should stop at 64? SixSeven bumps it to 67...cause... you know....
body:
![Description Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31264e0e2d0aeb76e693cd7f30723dea5590c481.png)

That’s it. That’s literally the entire mod. You can now hold 67 dirt instead of 64 dirt. 67 cobblestone. 67 whatever. If it stacks more than 1, it stacks to 67. Tools and armor still don’t stack. But everything else? 67. I have to type more here because Modrinth wants 200 characters minimum, so uh… yeah. This mod exists purely because the internet collectively decided that 67 is funny..... And honestly? I caved in... Enjoy your slightly bigger stacks. You’re welcome.
